description: Webex post-call ultrasound retention: ProcessAudio stays live (Cisco holds the mic for device discovery), so the only end signals are ShareableContent (leading) and the AX Leave button. END6/AUD-10 treats those two as one correlated evidence class (a share re-render invalidates the Leave button and drops the call window together), so the ax-leave second signal no longer instant-confirms on the fast path; instead the reliable window-gone lead promotes on the 2 s debounce (the tick after t=42), with the absorbed ax-leave recorded in confirmed_by. In production the AX re-walk (confirmProvisionalEnd, fired by rescueProvisionalEnd) would also confirm a genuine leave promptly; the corpus models only the pure engine, so the debounce tick stands in for that.
